negotiated_from: problem-success.md goals G1-G5 and success metrics SM1-SM6

gates.statement: expanded enforces anti-compression by default: a compressed-family plan fails normalize-plan with exit 3 and bad_compressed_normalized_plan.
deepwiki-scale is a behaviour-identical compatibility alias of expanded (same passed/exit_code/defect codes).
baseline/enhancement never run the anti-compression gate; full suite green.

The source-derived breadth budget computes catalog-derived page/required-topic targets and a per-family fan-out floor (RAGFlow catalog: >=36 pages, >=94 required topics, vs the 21-page/42-TER collapse).
gates.verification: tests/test_deepwiki_scale_core.py::BreadthBudgetTests + manual derive_breadth_budget over the real RAGFlow topic-catalog.json

gates.statement: Embedded planner prompts and Gem prompt files instruct fan-out, one TER per promoted catalog topic, no broad page claiming leaf coverage, and reference the breadth budget.
plans/promoted-topic-contract.json is emitted + loadable, and a promoted catalog topic that is a sufficient obligation but omitted from generated output fails Phase 4 generated coverage.
No validator weakened; protected spec unchanged; Python hard rules honoured (explicit typing, no mutable defaults, no import-time side effects, DI policy, deterministic tests).
gates.verification: git diff --exit-code on protected spec; full pytest; code review of anti_compression.py/generated_coverage.py

gates.statement: DEFERRED (explicitly staged, not a failure): a standalone Phase 4 gate that cross-references plans/promoted-topic-contract.json end-to-end and a billed live RAGFlow run.
gates.verification: status.md follow-up slice; not required for this slice's done
